title: E&I Maintenance Engineer (Chemical Plant)
description:
• Plan, coordinate and manage daily maintenance activities with in-house & external contractors and to execute maintenance timely and effectively.
  • Analyze and improve equipment reliability of utilities & facilities to prevent recurrence with production group and contractors, prepare RCA and fallow up actions with Sr Engineers.
  • Prepare/Review spare parts list and equipment data inventory control and ensure critical spare availability, optimize spare parts, and manage stock effectively by using CMMS.
  • Analyse and improve equipment reliability of plant to prevent recurrence with production
    group and contractors.
  • Manage annual shutdown/Grade change maintenance (Work planning, Management of actual site work, Liaising with contractors and production group).
  • Good knowledge and hand-on experience with PLC system maintenance/inspection of plant electrical and instrumentation equipment (eg. TI, TT, PI, PT, CV, on/off valve, motor, Switchgear, MCC etc.
  • Leading troubleshooting efforts when E&I problems occur, quickly diagnosing the cause, and ensuring that repairs are carried out effectively.
  • Support in implementation and participate in the continuous improvement effort in the areas of Safety, Quality, Environment and Health Management System (for example SS506 part 3, ISO 9001, ISO14001, OHSAS 18001, IATF 16949).
  • To have a legal obligation to act in a responsible manner for the safety of themselves and other persons who may be affected by their actions or omissions at work.
  • Assist the Management in ensuring that Major Accident Hazards are reduced to As Low as Reasonably Practicable (ALARP) and escalate when necessary.
  • Work as team and support inter and Intra Department woks and demonstrate company Core Values.
  • Ensure all maintenance activities comply with EHSQ policies by review & implement MSRA.

Interested Candidates, Please send your Detailed Resume stating Past Employments, Including Reasons of Leaving, Current / Last Drawn and Expected Salary

Kindly send in your latest job resume without your NRIC numbers and other ID numbers.

For job resume(s) that contain NRIC numbers and/ or ID details, it may not be processed and your job application may be rejected due to unacceptable submission of job application details. Please refer to the advisory guidelines on the PDPA for NRIC numbers and other ID numbers.

By sending your job resume to us, it shall be deemed that you have agreed and hereby give your consent to MANFIELD in collecting, using and/ or disclosing your personal data for the purpose of accessing and processing your job application and/ or for future job opportunities within MANFIELD and/ or with the client(s) of MANFIELD. If you wish to withdraw your consent, please notify us. Kindly visit our company website for more information on the Privacy Policy.

WE REGRET TO INFORM THAT ONLY SHORTLISTED CANDIDATES WILL BE NOTIFIED

postedCompany.description:
Manfield is a professional Headhunting, Recruitment and Consultancy Company first established in Singapore since 1995, we have also expanded our presence to Mainland China since 2005.

Our consultants in Manfield possess in-depth knowledge and expertise of industries that they specialise in.

With more than 100,000 unique profiles in our database, our dedicated team is constantly to source, interview and shortlist the ideal people for organisations, and have the passion to deliver effective human capital solutions. We are passionate to serve to our best capacity. We uphold professional values and instill confidence in our clients, including establishing long term business relationships with them.
